# Ant Code v1.4 Orchestration Acceptance

Date: 2026-05-01

## Scope

This record closes Stage 7 through Stage 10 of
the internal external-capabilities and agent-orchestration upgrade plan.

## Stage Status

| Stage | Status | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Stage 7 agent profile v2/router | Implemented | Built-in profiles now expose `triggerHints`, `skills`, `mcpServers`, and `outputContract`; `/agents route <task>` explains routing. |
| Stage 8 parallel subtask tree | Implemented | `/agents orchestrate <task>` starts parallel read-only child tasks and records parent/child task metadata; `/agents tasks` and the TUI task panel render task trees. |
| Stage 9 permission/audit | Implemented | Permission risks include `network`, `browser`, `document`, `mcp`, and `memory`; MCP child processes scrub sensitive env vars and report scrubbed keys in status. |
| Stage 10 docs/tests | Implemented | Added router/task-tree/profile/permission/MCP env tests and updated onboarding/changelog/plan docs. |

## Manual Acceptance Script

Run from the active repo:

```powershell
cd <repo-root>
node .\src\cli\index.js tui
```

Suggested checks:

1. Run `/agents route 帮我联网搜索 Ant Code 资料并整理来源`.
   Expected: route recommends `web-researcher` and lists web/search/fetch style tasks.

2. Run `/agents route 调查这个大仓库架构，规划 stage，然后修复一个 bug`.
   Expected: route lists at least two read-only parallel-safe suggestions such as `explorer` and `planner`, and keeps `code-worker` as serial/write-capable.

3. Run `/agents orchestrate 调查当前仓库的 agent、mcp、skill 架构，不要修改代码`.
   Expected: right task panel switches to task view and shows a parent orchestration task plus child read-only tasks. If no gateway is configured, read-only fallback may still complete with local scans.

4. Run `/agents tasks`.
   Expected: output is a tree, not a flat list.

5. Run `/mcp status fetch` or `/mcp doctor`.
   Expected: MCP status remains readable; enabled MCP calls still require permission based on risk.

6. Trigger or inspect a browser/memory/document permission path when available.
   Expected: permission modal labels the risk as `[browser]`, `[memory]`, or `[doc]`, not a generic red error.

## Safety Notes

- Orchestration starts only read-only parallel child tasks.
- Write-capable and execute/browser tasks remain explicit serial suggestions.
- Subagents cannot recursively call `agent_run`.
- Profile-scoped subagents can only see declared MCP servers and skills when those restrictions are present.
- MCP process environments scrub secret-like variables by default. Use explicit `envAllowlist` only for a reviewed local server that truly needs a variable.

## Verification

Required release gate:

```powershell
npm run check
```

The gate covers syntax, forbidden endpoints, provenance, dependency policy, and
the unit/integration test suite.
